economic_notes: Sambaa K'e Development Corporation (100% owned, property rental and construction). Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership (14.27% owned, helicopter leasing and charters). Auditor issued qualified opinion due to unavailability of financial statements of Sambaa K'e Development Corporation.
notes: Qualified audit opinion issued because financial statements of Sambaa K'e Development Corporation (100% owned subsidiary) were not available. Auditor unable to determine if further adjustments were necessary to investments in government business enterprises, earnings from GBEs, deficiency of revenues over expenditures, and changes in net debt. Province is NT (Northwest Territories). Deh Cho Helicopters financial data presented is for year ended May 31, 2020 (one year lag). Investment in Sambaa K'e Development Corporation is negative ($80,282) due to accumulated losses exceeding cost. Contributions repayable increased significantly from $6,268 to $39,688. No long-term debt. Loss on disposal of capital assets of $89,573 recorded.
